THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, FRANCISCO GONZALEZ. PARTIES AGREEMENT, DEFENDANT WILL PAY $50.00 PER MONTH.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2008 IS CONTINUED TO APR-13-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $100 PER MONTH COMMENCING 12/15/08 AND CONTINUING ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL FULLY PAID OR FURTHER COURT ORDER. IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTS ON THE MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS, THE REMAINING BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO MODIFY INSTALLMENTS.
